Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery;
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew W. Cary, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Donald R. Krohn
James R. Walsh, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kevin J. Croak

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiff Donald Krohn's Motion to compel further responses to written discovery granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
1. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, plaintiff shall serve code compliant, verified, supplemental responses to following discovery requests:
a. Form interrogatories no. 9.1; 9.2; 15.1; and 50.2;
b. Special interrogatories no. 2, 3, 6, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, and 21;
c. With reference to form interrogatory no. 12.1, the parties shall meet and confer to agree upon a definition of "incident" for purposes of this interrogatory; and defendant thereafter shall serve a code compliant, verified, supplemental response;
d. Request for production of documents no. 21, 22, 24, and 25
2. As to request for production of documents no. 19 and 20, plaintiff to transfer the hard drive of defendant's computer to verify that information previosly produced is complete. Plaintiff may copy any further responsive information discovered on the computer.
Compliance on the entire order to be completed by May 4, 2009 by noon. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-26-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608
